required_skills: Executive-level strategic planning and organizational design
Senior stakeholder management and C-suite communication
Cross-functional program management and portfolio prioritization
Financial acumen including P&L understanding and budget management
Advanced structured communication — written memos, board materials, investor narratives
Leadership presence and ability to represent the CEO in high-stakes settings
Operational excellence and process architecture at scale
preferred_skills: Prior Chief of Staff, management consulting (MBB), or PE/VC experience
Experience managing or mentoring junior team members and building internal capabilities
Exposure to fundraising, M&A due diligence, or post-merger integration
Understanding of people operations, talent strategy, and org design principles
Familiarity with legal, compliance, or regulatory environments relevant to the company's industry
Experience running executive offsites, leadership forums, and all-hands events
Track record of building 0-to-1 functions or teams within a high-growth company
responsibilities: Serve as the CEO's strategic right hand, owning the executive operating cadence including weekly leadership reviews, board meetings, and all-hands communications
Drive company-wide OKR setting, quarterly business reviews, and annual planning processes, ensuring strategic alignment across all functions
Act as a proxy for the CEO in cross-functional leadership meetings, making decisions and communicating priorities with full executive authority
Identify and resolve organizational misalignments, escalations, and execution gaps before they reach the CEO's desk
Lead high-impact special projects — from market entry strategy to org restructuring — with full accountability for outcomes and timelines
Manage the CEO's time, priorities, and external relationships, ensuring energy is allocated to highest-leverage activities
Build and maintain a strategic dashboard that tracks company-wide KPIs, fundraising milestones, and board commitments in real time
Coordinate investor relations, prepare board materials, and manage communications with key external stakeholders including investors and advisors
Design and implement scalable internal processes, operating models, and governance structures as the company grows through key inflection points
Recruit, onboard, and develop high-performing teams across strategic initiatives, acting as an organizational force multiplier for the CEO
